properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Others may sing of the future of the world Others may sing of their lives Others may sing for the world to hear Others for the glory of God. x 2

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is the theme, the theme of my song He is the light from above, Glory and praises to Him belong Jesus, the theme of my song.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Fresh as the dew that falls from above Welcome as dawn with its light Story of Jesus, story of love His love can never decline x 2.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Join me and sing for the glory of God Join me and let us praise God Join me and let us of Jesus tell His love can never decline x 2.
